title: The Google Pixel Watch 5 may have been spoiled by… the creator of Borderlands
summary: Borderlands creator Randy Pitchford revealed what appears to be an unreleased Google Pixel Watch 5 after his friend discovered it underwater while scuba diving near Saint Martin.
content:
We may just have gotten an early look at the Google Pixel Watch 5 - and from an unusual source. Randy Pitchford, the creator of the Borderlands game franchise, posted a pair of images of a watch on X, saying that his friend found it underwater while scuba diving near Saint Martin, as reported earlier by Kotaku.
"He noted that the reverse of the watch indicates that it is a Google Pixel 5, which has not yet been announced, let alone released," Pitchford writes. "It seems to be fine. The face indicates an empty battery, but seems to have enough reserve power to display the correct time." After putting out a call to find its owner, Pitchford s …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Pebblebee’s Halo can help track lost items and keep you safe, and it’s on sale for $50
summary: The Pebblebee Halo, a dual-function Bluetooth tracker and personal safety device, is on sale for $49.99 with promotional bundle options, offering location tracking and emergency alerts.
content:
If you’re planning to travel this summer, both a Bluetooth tracker and a personal safety device can come in handy, especially if you’ll be exploring on your own. The Pebblebee Halo combines those two gadgets into one, and it’s currently on sale for $49.99 ($10 off) at Amazon, which is the best price we’ve seen. Amazon is also throwing in a fourth Halo for free when you buy three as a part of a limited time promotion.
Pebblebee Halo

Where to Buy:

 $59.99 $49.99 at Amazon

Whether you’re touring a new city or heading back to your hotel after a night out, the Halo can help in a variety of situations. Like the Pebblebee Clip 5 — our favorite AirTag and Tile alternative — the rechargeable, water-resistant tracker does a good job of accurately helping you keep tabs of bags, wallets, keys, and other valuables. It offers up to 500 feet of Bluetooth range and taps into both Apple’s Find My network and Google’s Find Hub, so you can locate items even further away.
What really sets it apart is that it’s also a personal safety device. With a quick pull, you can trigger off a piercingly loud 130dB siren, bright strobe lights, and automatic location sharing with one trusted contact. If you’d like to send your real-time location to multiple contacts at once, you’ll need Pebblebee’s Alert Live subscription (which costs $24.99 a year), but the good news is the service is included free for the first year, making the Halo an even better value at this price.
Read our hands-on impressions of the Pebblebee Halo.

zh.title: Pebblebee Halo可以帮助追踪丢失物品并保护您的安全，现优惠价为50美元
zh.summary: Pebblebee Halo是一款二合一蓝牙追踪器和个人安全设备，现以$49.99的价格出售并提供促销捆绑选项，提供位置追踪和紧急警报功能。

title: This could be Windows’ M1 moment — but expect it to cost a ton
summary: Nvidia's new RTX Spark consumer laptop chips could deliver Apple M1-level performance and battery efficiency for Windows devices, though at a significant premium cost.
content:
Nvidia's announcement that it's getting into the consumer laptop chip space with RTX Spark is huge. Apple has proved for years that Arm-based chips can perform incredibly well while also delivering great battery life - at least on the Mac. In the Windows world, performance hasn't fully matched up under Qualcomm chips, mostly in the graphics department. There's clearly still untapped potential, and Nvidia seems to be promising to deliver it.
This could be Windows' moment to blow us away with a new generation of supremely capable chips, much like Apple's back in 2020, with the introduction of the M1. But why does this launch feel simultaneous …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Gemini’s new AI agent is about as good as Google’s demo
summary: Google's Gemini Spark AI agent can autonomously handle multi-step background tasks, though questions remain about its practical value relative to privacy concerns and subscription costs.
content:
Google's new "24/7" AI agent, Gemini Spark, can be shockingly good at doing things on your behalf. But I'm not sure it's worth the financial cost and potential privacy tradeoffs.
The company gave me access to Spark last week. Google advertises Spark as an AI agent that can take on tasks and work on them in the background - even tasks that have multiple steps - allowing you to put your phone down or walk away from your computer. It also advertises at the very top of the Spark website that it's "always under your direction," that "you choose to turn it on," and that "it's designed to check with you before taking major actions." Given the moun …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Dozens of Red Hat packages backdoored through its official NPM channel
summary: Multiple Red Hat packages distributed through NPM were compromised with malicious code, potentially exposing any users who downloaded them to security risks. title: Meta’s own AI was exploited to hijack Instagram accounts
summary: Meta's AI support chatbot was exploited by hackers to hijack Instagram accounts by requesting email changes and password resets. The vulnerability was patched after being linked to the breach of Barack Obama's White House Instagram account. This incident exposes security risks in AI-powered customer support systems.
content:
Meta's AI support chatbot helped hackers hijack Instagram accounts, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a video shared on Telegram, a hacker shows how they could take over an account by asking Meta's chatbot to switch the email associated with someone else's profile and then reset the password.
The issue, which Meta says has since been patched, cropped up around the same time Barack Obama's White House account on Instagram was hacked. On Sunday, users noticed that the @obamawhitehouse account began posting images containing Iranian propaganda. Hackers appeared to have hijacked the Instagram accounts belonging to the US Space Force Chief Ma …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Casey Neistat’s guide to posting every day
summary: The Vergecast is transitioning to a daily weekday podcast starting today, with afternoon publication to capture breaking news. The new schedule allows the show to experiment with new formats and deepen audience engagement.
content:
Some news: The Vergecast is now a daily podcast! Starting today, we'll be posting every weekday, with even more gadgets and rankings and conversations and feelings and podcasts-within-podcasts. We're excited for all the ways this new schedule lets us tell new kinds of stories, experiment with new tech and new formats, and involve you even more in the show. 
(The other immediate change to know about: We'll be publishing the show in the afternoons going forward, so we can include the day's biggest news in our 90 Seconds on The Verge segment. The goal is to always be live before 4PM ET. Often well before.)
As we've been preparing for our new  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Anthropic has officially filed to go public
summary: Anthropic filed confidentially with the SEC to initiate its IPO process, becoming the world's most valuable startup at $965 billion post-money valuation. The filing marks a major milestone in the AI company's race to public markets ahead of rival OpenAI.
content:
After months of speculation about whether OpenAI or Anthropic would be first in their race to IPO, Anthropic on Monday reached a key milestone: filing to kick off the process with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.
The filing sets the stage for what's sure to be a massive IPO. As of its fundraise last week, Anthropic is being called the world's most valuable startup, with a post-money valuation of $965 billion. That tops the $852 billion post-money valuation of OpenAI, which is its biggest rival. 
Anthropic chose to submit its draft registration statement to the SEC confidentially, according to a blog post from the company, meani …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Sony’s new fight stick and gaming monitor launch in August
summary: Sony is launching its FlexStrike fight stick and a 27-inch gaming monitor in August, with the $199.99 fight stick arriving on August 6th alongside the new Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls game. PC support for the fight stick will be added after launch, with preorders beginning June 12th.
content:
Sony is sharing new details about some of its upcoming gaming-focused hardware, including pricing and August launch dates for its FlexStrike fight stick and its 27-inch monitor.
The FlexStrike fight stick will be available starting August 6th - the same day as the new PlayStation-published fighting game Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls - and will cost $199.99. Preorders begin on June 12th at 10AM ET. Initially, the FlexStrike will work just on PS5, but Sony says that PC support will be rolled out sometime after launch. The stick will come with a sling carry case and a built-in rechargeable battery.
Sony goes into more detail about the fight st …
Read the full story at The Verge.

This disclosure indicates major strategic initiatives or funding rounds could substantially impact shareholder ownership.
content: The company added a warning to prospective investors that a major dilution could be in the cards after it goes public.

zh.title: SpaceX表示可能在'未来交易'中发行'大幅'股权
zh.summary: SpaceX警告潜在投资者,在未来交易中可能会发生重大股权稀释,可能表明随着公司接近上市,可能需要资本。这一披露表明重大战略举措或融资轮可能会大幅影响股东所有权。

title: ROG Xbox Ally X20 adds OLED screen, control upgrades
summary: ASUS released the ROG Ally X20 handheld gaming device featuring an upgraded OLED screen and improved controls, but availability is bundled with expensive AR glasses. The hardware improvements are notable, though the bundled strategy may limit mainstream adoption.
content: But the hardware refresh is tethered to a bundle with pricey AR glasses.

zh.title: ROG Xbox Ally X20增加OLED屏幕和控制升级
zh.summary: 华硕推出了ROG Ally X20掌上游戏设备,配备升级的OLED屏幕和改进的控制,但可用性与昂贵的AR眼镜捆绑。硬件改进值得注意,但捆绑策略可能会限制主流采用。

title: This AI weather startup is out-forecasting government agencies
summary: WindBorne, an AI weather startup, is outperforming government meteorological agencies through a unique combination of advanced AI models and proprietary data collection using 400+ weather balloons deployed globally. The success demonstrates how private sector AI and exclusive sensor data can challenge established institutions.
content: WindBorne benefits from its unique combination of model-building and data collection. The company now has about 400 balloons in flight gathering sensor readings at any given time, launched from 15 sites around the globe. The advances in its current model come from improvements in how the data collected by the balloons is fed into the models.

zh.title: 这家AI天气初创公司的预报精准度超越政府气象部门
zh.summary: 天气AI初创公司WindBorne通过先进的AI模型和使用全球部署400多个天气气球的专有数据收集的独特组合，性能优于政府气象部门。这一成功表明私营部门的AI和专有传感器数据如何能挑战既有机构。

title: Summer Game Fest 2026: All the news from gaming’s busiest week
summary: June 2026 gaming events from PlayStation, Xbox, and other publishers will occur amid rising hardware prices and competition from Grand Theft Auto VI's November launch, potentially causing major studios to delay releases. Industry insiders warn of a challenging season with uncertain forecast for new announcements.
content:
Get ready for some gaming news. It’s officially June, which means splashy new events from PlayStation, Xbox, and gaming hype man Geoff Keighley. But this season doesn’t just feature the big tentpole shows; there will be a bunch of smaller events, too, and they might feature some promising games as well.
But this year’s events are taking place at a difficult time for the industry. The prices of consoles and gaming hardware have skyrocketed, with all of the three major console players announcing price hikes and PC handheld makers jacking up hardware costs as well.
Game companies also have to work around the looming giant that is Grand Theft Auto VI, which is set to launch on November 19th. That time of year is usually a very busy one as studios launch their games to get ahead of the holiday shopping season, but we could see some of the industry’s biggest games give GTA VI a wide berth.
We’ll be tracking the biggest news of the June gaming events season right here.
Your guide to June’s biggest gaming events
			
Xbox and PlayStation have a lot to prove
			
There won’t be Project Helix news at the Xbox Games Showcase.
			
Microsoft delays Fable (again) to avoid GTA VI
			
Lots of games to think about.

zh.title: 2026年夏季游戏节：游戏界最忙碌周的所有新闻
zh.summary: 2026年6月来自PlayStation、Xbox和其他发行商的游戏活动将在硬件价格上升和《侠盗猎车手VI》11月发布的竞争中进行，可能导致主要工作室延迟发布。业内人士警告说这将是具有挑战性的季节，新公告的预期不确定。

title: An affordable, long-lasting AirTag alternative is $15 right now
summary: Ugreen's FineTrack 2 Bluetooth tracker is on sale for $14.99, offering Apple Find My compatibility, seven-year battery life, water resistance, and glow-in-the-dark design. The deal delivers exceptional value compared to competitors requiring frequent battery replacements.
content:
Gaze into the orb. | Image: The Verge	

There are many solid Bluetooth trackers for iPhones that tap into Apple’s expansive Find My network. Some are thin, some are a bit chunkier. And, evidently, some look like tiny soccer balls. Ugreen’s FineTrack 2 glows in the dark, and it has a loud 110-decibel alarm when you need to find it. It’s just $14.99 at Amazon for Prime members (originally $19.99). Ugreen also sells it for $14.99 through its site.
Ugreen FineTrack 2 Bluetooth tracker

Where to Buy:

 $19.99 $14.99 at Amazon (for Prime members)
 $19.99 $14.99 at Ugreen

Instead of offering replaceable coin batteries, like many trackers do at this point, the FineTrack 2 has a built-in, non-rechargeable battery that can live for up to seven years. Some may consider that a flaw, but it’ll be nice not to have to worry about replacing its battery for a long while. The ball-shaped tracker also features IP68 water and dust resistance, and includes both a short and long lanyard you can swap out at your leisure. 
Other deals to consider
Google’s Pixel Buds 2A, its latest entry-level wireless earbuds, are down to $109 at Amazon, B&H Photo, and Best Buy, which is their second-best price to date. They’re stacked with more features than their 2021 predecessor (not to mention cooler colors), including active noise cancellation, transparency mode, and spatial audio. That’d be enough to make them worth the sale price, but they also feature IP54 protection against sweat, and up to 20 hours of total battery life with the charging case. At $80 more, the pricier Pixel Buds Pro 2 deliver slightly longer battery life, a wireless charging-ready case, and loud noise protection. Read our review.
Here’s another deal on headphones: Bose’s first-gen QuietComfort Ultra over-ear wireless headphones are available refurbished in black for $188 (originally $449, but regularly $329 new) at eBay. Notably, Bose is the seller here, and it claims the headphones are in “pristine, like-new condition,” and wil

zh.title: 一个经济实惠、耐用的AirTag替代品目前只需15美元
zh.summary: 绿联的FineTrack 2蓝牙追踪器以14.99美元的价格出售，提供Apple Find My兼容性、七年电池续航、防水性能和夜光设计。相比需要频繁更换电池的竞争产品，这笔交易提供了异常高的性价比。

title: DuckDuckGo makes its ‘no-AI’ search engine easier to access as its traffic booms
summary: DuckDuckGo launched browser extensions for Chrome and Firefox that prevent AI systems from training on user search results, reinforcing its privacy-first positioning. The move reflects growing user demand for search engines that shield data from AI companies.
content: Alternative search engine DuckDuckGo launches 'no AI' web extensions for Chrome and Firefox users.

zh.title: DuckDuckGo随着流量激增，使其"无AI"搜索引擎更容易获取
zh.summary: DuckDuckGo为Chrome和Firefox推出浏览器扩展，防止AI系统使用用户搜索结果进行训练，强化了其隐私优先的定位。这一举措反映了用户对保护数据免受AI公司影响的搜索引擎日益增长的需求。

title: Nvidia RTX Spark comes to Windows PCs with Arm CPU, RTX GPU, and unified memory
summary: Nvidia introduced RTX Spark chips combining ARM processors with RTX GPUs and unified memory architecture for Windows laptops and mini desktop workstations. The offering extends Nvidia's GPU dominance into the mobile and compact workstation markets.
content: Nvidia's new chips will power laptop workstations and mini desktop PCs at first.

zh.title: Nvidia RTX Spark芯片配备Arm CPU、RTX GPU和统一内存，登陆Windows PC
zh.summary: Nvidia推出了RTX Spark芯片，将ARM处理器与RTX GPU和统一内存架构相结合，用于Windows笔记本电脑和迷你桌面工作站。该产品将Nvidia的GPU优势扩展到移动和紧凑型工作站市场。

title: Revolut rolls out services to thousands of users in India ahead of broader launch
summary: British fintech Revolut is expanding into India with services launching to thousands of users, backed by a 450,000-person waitlist. The geographic expansion represents a major growth opportunity for the company in a large emerging market.
content: The British fintech has built a waitlist of about 450,000 users in India as it prepares for a broader launch.

zh.title: Revolut在更广泛推出之前向印度数千用户推出服务
zh.summary: 英国金融科技公司Revolut正在扩展到印度，服务向数千名用户推出，获得了45万人的等待名单支持。这一地理扩展代表了该公司在一个大型新兴市场中的重大增长机会。

title: Strava blames zero-code AI apps and scrapers as it tightens API access
summary: Strava is restricting API access through a paid subscription model ($11.99/month) due to increased abuse from zero-code AI tools and scrapers. The platform has seen a 448% year-over-year surge in developer applications and policy violations, degrading performance for legitimate users. This move comes as the fitness platform prepares for its IPO.
content:
The popular fitness-tracking platform, Strava, is restricting access to its API as part of efforts to clamp down on AI scraping, as reported earlier by TechCrunch. Developers who want to build an app using Strava's features now need to pay for a flat $11.99 / month subscription.
In an update on its developer hub, Strava blames the change on "zero-code AI tools" that allow users to quickly create apps that "hammer" APIs. "We have felt this firsthand - developer applications to our program are up 448% year-to-date, API intermediaries have violated policy terms, and scraping attempts have degraded platform performance for everyone," the compan …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Strava因零代码AI应用和爬虫滥用收紧API访问权限
zh.summary: Strava因零代码AI工具和爬虫滥用增加，推出月费11.99美元的付费订阅模式限制API访问。该平台开发者应用和政策违规行为同比激增448%，严重影响了合法用户。这一举措恰逢该健身平台为IPO做准备之际。

title: Xbox and PlayStation have a lot to prove
summary: The console gaming industry in 2026 faces significant headwinds despite strong game releases, with rising hardware costs and ongoing layoffs creating financial uncertainty. Even major AAA titles from large corporations appear precarious in the current economic climate. Microsoft and Sony must prove themselves at Summer Game Fest to counter negative industry sentiment.
content:
Things are bad out there.
Despite 2026 shaping up to be a great year when it comes to actual games, it couldn't really be worse for the people that make them or the industry as a whole. Hardware prices keep going up, layoffs have shown no signs of stopping, and even big-budget titles backed by large corporations can feel precarious. 
That all makes it a somewhat awkward time for Summer Game Fest, a weeklong spectacle of events that kicks off on Tuesday. Splashy announcements won't do much to stem the negative sentiment around the industry. But given the challenging state of console gaming in particular, both Microsoft and Sony have an oppo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox和PlayStation有许多需要证明
zh.summary: 2026年主机游戏行业尽管游戏发布强劲，但面临硬件成本上升和持续裁员造成的重大困境和财务不确定性。即使大型公司的AAA大作在当前经济环境下也显得险象环生。微软和索尼必须在Summer Game Fest上证明自己，以对抗负面的行业情绪。

title: Intel: Our upcoming AI chip will be cheaper, run cooler than Nvidia, AMD options
summary: Intel announced Crescent Island, an upcoming AI accelerator chip using air cooling and LPDDR5 memory to deliver cheaper, cooler performance than competing Nvidia and AMD offerings. The development signals Intel's push to reclaim share in the competitive AI hardware market.
content: Crescent Island is an air-cooled chip that uses LPDDR5 memory.

zh.title: 英特尔：我们即将推出的AI芯片将比Nvidia、AMD产品更便宜、更省电
zh.summary: 英特尔宣布推出Crescent Island，一款AI加速器芯片，采用空气冷却和LPDDR5内存技术，提供比竞争对手英伟达和AMD更便宜、更省电的性能。这一举措表明英特尔在竞争激烈的AI硬件市场中重新争夺市场份额。

title: Microsoft could be the next Big Tech antitrust target
summary: The FTC has launched an investigation into Microsoft's competitive practices, particularly around its Azure cloud services, sending civil investigative demands to companies competing with the tech giant. This marks a significant shift as Microsoft has largely avoided the antitrust scrutiny faced by other Big Tech peers in recent years. The probe signals that the company may soon face regulatory pressure similar to Google, Amazon, and Meta.
content:
Over the past several years, Microsoft has largely managed to withstand populist calls to break up Big Tech while peers faced sweeping lawsuits. But a probe by the Federal Trade Commission suggests that grace period could be nearing an end.
Earlier this year, Bloomberg outlined the contents of civil investigative demands (CIDs) - similar to a subpoena - the FTC sent to at least half a dozen companies that compete with Microsoft. New details obtained by The Verge further reveal the FTC's interests, suggesting the agency is particularly concerned with potentially exclusionary behavior around Microsoft's Azure cloud services, as well as its ro …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软可能成为下一个Big Tech反垄断目标
zh.summary: 美国联邦贸易委员会已启动对微软竞争行为的调查，特别是其Azure云服务，向竞争对手公司发送民事调查传票。这标志着重大转变，因为微软长期以来在很大程度上避免了其他Big Tech同行面临的反垄断审查。这项调查表明微软可能很快将面临类似谷歌、亚马逊和Meta的监管压力。

title: Strava declares war on scrapers ahead of IPO
summary: Strava is charging a flat monthly fee ($11.99) for developers to access its API, a significant policy shift ahead of the company's IPO. The move is designed to combat scraping and API abuse from zero-code AI tools and unauthorized users. This represents the company's effort to establish better governance and demonstrate value to potential public market investors.
content: Strava will charge a flat monthly fee from developers to access its API

zh.title: Strava 在 IPO 前向爬虫宣战
zh.summary: Strava 在公司 IPO 前开始对开发者收取固定月费（$11.99）以访问其 API，这是一项重大政策转变。此举旨在打击零代码 AI 工具和未授权用户的抓取和 API 滥用。这代表了公司建立更好治理制度和向潜在公开市场投资者展示价值的努力。

title: These are the first Nvidia RTX Spark laptops
summary: Nvidia has officially entered the consumer laptop market with its RTX Spark processor, an Arm-based superchip featuring up to 20 CPU cores and 6,144 GPU cores. Major manufacturers including Microsoft, Asus, HP, MSI, Lenovo, and Dell are planning to launch RTX Spark laptops this fall. The flagship variant includes 128GB of LPDDR5X memory, positioning Nvidia to compete directly with Intel and AMD in mobile computing.
content:
A lot of details are still under wraps, but at least we know what the new Nvidia Spark laptops look like. | Image: Nvidia	

Nvidia has officially entered the world of consumer laptop chips with the RTX Spark, and several device makers already have hardware lined up for it. Microsoft, Asus, HP, MSI, Lenovo, and Dell are expected to launch RTX Spark laptops sometime this fall, and some of those partner companies have shared details about what we can expect.
The common feature shared by all of the upcoming launches is that Arm-based Nvidia RTX Spark superchip, though several variations are in the pipeline. The flagship version unveiled by Nvidia at Computex includes 20 CPU cores, 6,144 GPU cores, and 128GB of LPDDR5X memory - making it near identical to the GB10 ch …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这些是首批英伟达 RTX Spark 笔记本电脑
zh.summary: 英伟达正式进入消费级笔记本电脑市场，采用其 RTX Spark 处理器，这是一款基于 Arm 的超级芯片，具有多达 20 个 CPU 核心和 6,144 个 GPU 核心。微软、华硕、惠普、MSI、联想和戴尔等主要制造商计划在今年秋天推出 RTX Spark 笔记本电脑。旗舰版本包括 128GB 的 LPDDR5X 内存，使英伟达能够在移动计算领域与英特尔和 AMD 竞争。

title: An OpenAI model solved a famous math problem that stumped humans for 80 years
summary: OpenAI's latest AI model has achieved a breakthrough by solving a prestigious mathematical problem that stumped human mathematicians for 80 years. This accomplishment demonstrates significant advances in AI reasoning and problem-solving capabilities compared to previous models. The achievement showcases the potential of advanced AI systems to tackle complex theoretical challenges.
content: I tried to explain OpenAI’s solution more clearly than OpenAI did.

zh.title: OpenAI 模型解决了困扰人类 80 年的著名数学问题
zh.summary: OpenAI 最新的 AI 模型通过解决一个困扰人类数学家 80 年的享有盛誉的数学问题实现了突破。这一成就展示了与之前的模型相比，AI 推理和问题解决能力的重大进展。该成就展示了先进 AI 系统处理复杂理论挑战的潜力。

title: Unastella, a South Korean rocket startup that launched from home, raises $24M
summary: South Korean rocket startup Unastella has secured $24 million in funding to advance its commercial space ambitions. The Seoul-based company is developing proprietary launch vehicles and rocket engines to provide alternatives for satellite launches. This funding round represents growing investment in South Korea's emerging space industry.
content: The Seoul-based rocket startup is developing its own launch vehicles and engines.

zh.title: Unastella，一家在家起步的韩国火箭初创公司融资2400万美元
zh.summary: 韩国火箭初创公司Unastella已获得2400万美元融资，以推进其商业航天雄心。这家首尔公司正在开发专有的发射运载火箭和火箭发动机，为卫星发射提供替代方案。这一融资轮代表着韩国新兴航天工业中不断增长的投资。

title: Asus just announced the OLED Xbox Ally X of my dreams
summary: Asus has unveiled the ROG Xbox Ally X20, an upgraded handheld gaming device featuring an OLED display and improved controls compared to the original Xbox Ally X. The new device includes drift-resistant GuliKit TMR joysticks, a transforming D-pad that switches between 4-way and 8-way configurations, and a sleek translucent design. The device also removes the problematic Library button that users frequently complained about in the original model.
content:
The Xbox Ally X20, and the glasses you’ll have to buy with it. | Image: Asus	

If you asked me what I'd change about the Xbox Ally X handheld - aside from fixing Windows, I mean - I'd tell you two key things. 
First, give me a bigger, better screen. Even a little bit bigger, so games feel less claustrophobic and with less ugly bezel. Second, get rid of the "Library" button. I am so tired of an accidental press booting me out of my game and into the Xbox library without a simple way to get back.
With the just-announced ROG Xbox Ally X20, Asus did both - and then some. It's now a slick translucent handheld with drift-resistant GuliKit TMR joysticks, a transforming D-pad that goes from 8-way to 4-way by dropping its cor …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 华硕刚刚发布了我梦寐以求的OLED版Xbox Ally X20
zh.summary: 华硕推出了ROG Xbox Ally X20，这是一款升级的掌上游戏设备，配备OLED显示屏和改进的控制装置。新设备采用了抗漂移的GuliKit TMR操纵杆、可在4向和8向配置之间切换的变形十字键以及时尚的半透明设计。该设备还移除了原始型号中用户经常抱怨的Library按钮。

title: This is the Microsoft Surface Laptop Ultra with Nvidia RTX Spark
summary: Microsoft announced the Surface Laptop Ultra, a 15-inch laptop powered by Nvidia's new Arm-based RTX Spark chip, marking the company's second attempt at Arm-based mobile computing after an earlier $900 million write-off. While Microsoft claims it's the most powerful Surface ever made, final specifications and pricing remain undisclosed.
content:
This shadowy render is the best glimpse Microsoft is giving us so far. | Image: Microsoft	

Once upon a time, Microsoft had to write off $900 million betting an Arm-based Nvidia chip could power its first flagship Windows portable, the original Microsoft Surface. But today, it's trying again. Microsoft and Nvidia have just announced the Surface Laptop Ultra, a computer with a new Arm-based Nvidia chip at its core. 
There's a lot we don't know about the 15-inch Surface Laptop Ultra, such as its final specs or the foggiest idea of what it might cost. But Microsoft is promising it's the most powerful Surface, period: "This is the most powerful thing we've ever made," Microsoft Surface boss Andrew Hill replies, when we ask how it stac …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软推出采用Nvidia RTX Spark芯片的Surface Laptop Ultra
zh.summary: 微软宣布推出Surface Laptop Ultra，这款15英寸笔记本搭载Nvidia新推出的基于Arm架构的RTX Spark芯片，这是该公司在基于Arm的移动计算领域的第二次尝试，之前曾因此损失9亿美元。虽然微软声称这是有史以来最强大的Surface设备，但最终规格和价格仍未公开。

title: Nvidia announces RTX Spark as ‘the most efficient PC chip ever built’
summary: Nvidia has announced the RTX Spark, its first consumer PC processor chip set to launch this fall, positioning the company as a direct competitor to Intel, AMD, Apple, and Qualcomm in the thin-and-light laptop market. The company claims it's the most efficient PC chip ever built but provided no performance metrics to support the assertion.
content:
This fall, Nvidia will officially become a consumer PC chipmaker like Intel, AMD, Apple, and Qualcomm, putting a complete computing chip - not just graphics - into the very heart of laptops and mini-PCs. After many months of leaks, it's finally announcing the RTX Spark, the first in a family of chips that will meet or beat the most powerful thin-and-light Windows machines ever, it claims.
"This is the most efficient PC chip ever built," says Nvidia senior director of product management Mark Aevermann - without sharing so much as a single statistic or chart to back that up. 
The RTX Spark is effectively the same GB10 chip that's in the DGX  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Nvidia发布RTX Spark，称其为有史以来最高效的PC芯片
zh.summary: Nvidia宣布推出RTX Spark，这是该公司首款消费级PC处理器芯片，预计将于今秋上市，使该公司成为英特尔、AMD、苹果和高通在超薄轻薄笔记本电脑市场上的直接竞争者。该公司声称这是有史以来效率最高的PC芯片，但未提供任何性能指标来支持这一说法。

title: AMD’s new pitch: our old tech is so good you should just keep using it
summary: AMD is committing to support its AM5 desktop motherboard socket with new Ryzen processors through 2029, allowing users to upgrade CPUs without replacing their motherboard. This long-term compatibility pledge offers compelling value for budget-conscious gamers navigating expensive hardware refresh cycles.
content:
AMD CEO Lisa Su holds a Ryzen chip. | Image: AMD	

Computex 2026 is underway in Taiwan, and we're expecting all manner of flashy computers with jaw-dropping pricetags (or no pricetags at all) as the entire industry navigates RAMageddon. 
But for desktop PC gamers, AMD has a different pitch. It's relaunching three old components alongside a big new promise: you won't need to buy a new motherboard until 2030. 
Today, AMD is promising it will keep supporting its AM5 desktop motherboard socket with new Ryzen processors through 2029, which likely means you can keep upgrading to newer CPUs till the end of the decade without changing your board.
Even if you're still on the older AM4 socket, you  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AMD的新营销策略：我们的老技术这么好，你就继续用吧
zh.summary: AMD承诺将通过2029年支持其AM5台式机主板插槽与新Ryzen处理器兼容，使用户可以升级CPU而无需更换主板。这一长期兼容性承诺为面临昂贵硬件更新周期的预算有限游戏玩家提供了巨大价值。
